summary: Actions not pinned to SHA (critical security gap: actions/checkout@v4, oven-sh/setup-bun@v1 should reference commit SHAs). Workflow runs `bun install` without package.json—will fail. Core matrix-generator.ts exemplary: explicit types, clear logic, proper error returns. test-through-act.ts is comprehensive but never called—not integrated into pipeline despite being required artifact creator. Workflow tests fragile: output pattern matching (grep for error msgs, jq counts) will break on format changes. No explicit exit-code checks in test validation. Good: least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers, clear function decomposition. Fix: (1) pin actions; (2) add empty package.json; (3) call test-through-act from workflow step; (4) refactor test pattern matching.
